title: Meta Unveils Roadmap for New In-House AI Chips
description: WASHINGTON: Meta Platforms has announced plans to develop a new series of in-house artificial intelligence chips as part of its efforts to expand data-centre capacity...The post Meta Unveils Roadmap for New In-House AI Chips first appeared on Breaking News: Pakistan Diplomacy & International Affairs.

title: Atlassian To Cut Roughly 10% Jobs In Pivot To AI
description: Majority of impacted employees are in North America; AI changes skill mix, role requirements, CEO says.

title: Perth father blasts AI cameras as ‘outrageous’ after $550 seatbelt fine
description: A father’s beach trip turned into a $550 nightmare when AI cameras fined him for his daughter’s split-second move.

title: AI use by undergraduate students is nearly universal, survey suggests
description: Nearly all undergraduate students say they use generative artificial intelligence (AI) to help with their assessed work, a survey in the UK has found. Read full story

title: Nine in 10 Indian professionals say AI improves their productivity: Report
description: A new survey reveals India's workforce is optimistic about growth, with high AI adoption and evolving expectations for flexibility. Despite economic pressures, professionals show strong confidence, though rising costs are leading many to consider second jobs. Trust and collaboration remain vital, but hybrid work presents challenges for employers.
